On this Baisakhi ❤️ ( 14-04-2026 ) we proudly announce the launch of **KINGLINE FILMS PRODUCTION** Founded by Ankit Hans & Pushpinder Singh, backed by a core team with 70+ years of combined experience. Built over years of working behind the scenes and understanding what it truly takes to create something that lasts. We believe in creating stories that don’t just get seen, but stay. With years of experience behind the lens, we collaborate with brands and creators who value meaningful storytelling. If that sounds like you— we should talk. For more information, visit our website www.kinglinefilmsproduction.com #kinglinefilms #productionhouse #indianproductionhouse #tvc #film

For the past few years @iam.pushpindersingh has been consistently training at Actor Anatomyy, not to collect techniques, but to deepen his understanding of the craft. He himself is working as a celebrity Acting trainer in the industry. Recently, he completed our one-month online personal training, and what you see in this video is his analysis. A clear, honest breakdown of the process. A culmination of one month in-depth work. [actor, acting trainer, in-depth study, acting techniques, The Actor Anatomyy]

Step into the world of real acting. 🎭 If you’ve ever wanted to face the camera with confidence, understand emotions, and perform powerfully — this 2-Day Practical Acting Workshop is for you. Learn the fundamentals of acting through practical exercises, emotion techniques, and audition practice. You’ll also get a professionally directed monologue shoot with feedback to improve your performance. What you’ll learn: • Understanding what acting truly is • Meisner repetition exercises • Emotion access techniques • Sense memory training • Audition recording practice • Monologue preparation & performance 📅 14th & 15th March ⏰ 3 Hours Each Day 📍 White & Grey Studio, Sector 32, Faridabad (5 min walk from Mewala Maharajpur Metro) DM “ACTING” to register now.
